name: send_message
description: Send an outbound SMS/MMS message. Use this to deliver text content to a recipient phone number. Requires a Telnyx phone number you own as the sender (from). Do not use this for listing messages or checking status - use list_messages instead.

from.description: Sender phone number in E.164 format (e.g., +1234567890). Must be a Telnyx phone number you own.

to.description: Recipient phone number in E.164 format (e.g., +1234567890).

name: list_messages
description: Retrieve message history (sent and received). Use this to view past messages or check delivery status. Returns up to page_size messages ordered by most recent. Do not use this to send messages - use send_message instead.

page_size.description: Maximum number of messages to return. Must be a positive integer.

name: create_call
description: Initiate an outbound voice call. Use this to start a phone call from one of your Telnyx numbers to a recipient. The from number must be a Telnyx number you own, and connection_id must reference an existing SIP connection. Do not use this to list calls or check status - use list_calls or get_call instead.

from.description: Caller ID phone number in E.164 format (e.g., +1234567890). Must be a Telnyx phone number you own.

to.description: Recipient phone number in E.164 format (e.g., +1234567890).

connection_id.description: SIP connection ID to route the call through. Must be an existing connection from list_connections.

name: list_calls
description: List all active and recent calls. Use this to view call history or find call IDs. Returns all calls in the system. Do not use this to create calls - use create_call instead.

name: get_call
description: Retrieve details for a specific call by its ID. Use this to check call status, duration, or other metadata. Do not use this to list all calls - use list_calls instead.

id.description: Call ID to retrieve, for example call_1.

name: hangup_call
description: Terminate an active call by its ID. Use this to end an ongoing call. The call status will be set to completed. Do not use this to list calls - use list_calls instead.

id.description: Call ID to hang up, for example call_1.

name: list_numbers
description: List phone numbers owned by your Telnyx account. Use this to see which numbers you can use as sender IDs or for outbound calls. Returns up to page_size numbers. Do not use this to search for numbers to buy - use search_numbers instead.

page_size.description: Maximum number of phone numbers to return. Must be a positive integer.

name: search_numbers
description: Search for phone numbers available for purchase. Use this to find numbers before buying. Results are limited by the limit parameter. Do not use this to view your owned numbers - use list_numbers instead. Do not use this to purchase - use order_number instead.

country_code.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code to search in (e.g., US, GB, CA).

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return. Must be a positive integer.

name: order_number
description: Purchase one or more available phone numbers. Use this to buy phone numbers from the list of available numbers. The phone_numbers argument must be a JSON-encoded array of number strings in E.164 format (e.g., '["+1234567890"]'). Do not use this to search or list numbers - use search_numbers or list_numbers instead.

phone_numbers.description: JSON-encoded array of phone numbers to purchase in E.164 format (e.g., '["+1234567890", "+0987654321"]'). Numbers must be in the available_numbers list.

name: list_connections
description: List all SIP connections configured for your Telnyx account. Use this to view available connections and find connection IDs for creating calls. Do not use this to create connections - use create_connection instead.

name: create_connection
description: Create a new SIP connection for voice call routing. Use this to set up SIP trunking infrastructure. The connection_type defaults to 'ip' for IP-based routing. Do not use this to list connections - use list_connections instead.

connection_type.description: Connection type: 'ip' for IP-based SIP or 'sip' for username/password SIP authentication.

name: send_fax
description: Send a fax document to a recipient. Use this to transmit PDF documents via fax. The from number must be a Telnyx phone number you own. The media_url must point to a publicly accessible PDF. Do not use this to list faxes - use list_faxes instead.

from.description: Sender fax number in E.164 format (e.g., +1234567890). Must be a Telnyx phone number you own.

to.description: Recipient fax number in E.164 format (e.g., +1234567890).

media_url.description: Publicly accessible URL to the PDF document to send as fax.

name: list_faxes
description: List all sent and received faxes. Use this to view fax history or check delivery status. Returns all faxes in the system. Do not use this to send faxes - use send_fax instead.

name: get_balance
description: Retrieve your Telnyx account balance and available credit. Use this to check remaining credits before placing calls, sending messages, or purchasing numbers.
